title: Sutter Health scales AI tools across clinical workflows to ease staff burden and improve care coordination
description: Sutter Health rolled out AI tools across its clinics to cut paperwork and support clinicians during patient visits. The system handles imaging analysis, note-taking, and routine communication tasks automatically.

title: New light-based switch could cut chip energy use and speed future AI photonics
description: Photonic devices are hardware systems that can process information using light instead of electricity. These systems could potentially perform computations faster than electronic devices, while also consuming less energy.

title: New light-based switch could cut chip energy use and speed future AI photonics - Tech Xplore
description: New light-based switch could cut chip energy use and speed future AI photonics Tech Xplore Physicists create hybrid light-matter particles that interact strongly enough to compute Phys.org The same university that built the first computer in the world 80 years ago has just created a particle that is half light, half matter, and can make artificial intelligence much faster while consuming a fraction of today's energy.
